records.m_Talk_ENG: No way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, surprised?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, surprised?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, surprised?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Awareness distortion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Awareness distortion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Awareness distortion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you trying to hide... by going through all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you trying to hide... by going through all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to hide... by going through all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I think we're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I think we're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think we're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's talk details once we're inside. They're all waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's talk details once we're inside. They're all waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's talk details once we're inside. They're all waiting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm back! Did anything happen while I was gone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm back! Did anything happen while I was gone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm back! Did anything happen while I was gone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yay! It's Deputy Commander! She's back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yay! It's Deputy Commander! She's back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yay! It's Deputy Commander! She's back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Good job today, Ms. Swift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Good job today, Ms. Swift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Good job today, Ms. Swift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome back. I made some delicious carrot cake. Do you want some?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome back. I made some delicious carrot cake. Do you want some?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome back. I made some delicious carrot cake. Do you want some?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the people here have characteristics of animals...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the people here have characteristics of animals...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Do you want something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Do you want something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Do you want something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? A sunflower seed snack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? A sunflower seed snack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? A sunflower seed snack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. Normally, kids don't like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, thanks. It looks tasty.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?

records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough* W-what...?! Why's it so spicy...?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I-is this poison gas...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Keke!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Keke!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! See? Even if she's a part of the feline family, she's nothing like our Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're so stupid!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Pathetic!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Hopeless!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Even if you come that close, you don't scare me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Even if you come that close, you don't scare me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Even if you come that close, you don't scare me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the Weapon Development Bureau's youngest genius engineer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the Weapon Development Bureau's youngest genius engineer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the Weapon Development Bureau's youngest genius engineer!

If you lay a hand on Commander's hand-picked engineer, you'll

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eep?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eep?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You little brat! How dare you make fun of an adult?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You little brat! How dare you make fun of an adult?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You little brat! How dare you make fun of an adult?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: WAAAAAAAAH! DEPUTY COMMANDER!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: WAAAAAAAAH! DEPUTY COMMANDER!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: WAAAAAAAAH! DEPUTY COMMANDER!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Justine. You have a bump on your head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Justine. You have a bump on your head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Justine. You have a bump on your head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that...! That mean rookie did this to me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that...! That mean rookie did this to me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that...! That mean rookie did this to me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My brain is the only unique and important asset to the Administration! How could she hit me on the head...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My brain is the only unique and important asset to the Administration! How could she hit me on the head...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My brain is the only unique and important asset to the Administration! How could she hit me on the head...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give her the death penalty! Off with her head! This is mass lynching!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give her the death penalty! Off with her head! This is mass lynching!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give her the death penalty! Off with her head! This is mass lynching!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, her yapping is killing my ears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, her yapping is killing my ears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, her yapping is killing my ears.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's this rude brat, anyway? Is she also a descendant of Bygones?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's this rude brat, anyway? Is she also a descendant of Bygones?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's this rude brat, anyway? Is she also a descendant of Bygones?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She may not look like it, but Justine is an indispensable member of the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She may not look like it, but Justine is an indispensable member of the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She may not look like it, but Justine is an indispensable member of the Yaksha Division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Yaksha Division? Is that some kind of unit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Yaksha Division? Is that some kind of unit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Yaksha Division? Is that some kind of unit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! You don't know? It's a special division of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! You don't know? It's a special division of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! You don't know? It's a special division of the Administration!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we don't accept scrawny cats like you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we don't accept scrawny cats like you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we don't accept scrawny cats like you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you little...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you little...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you little...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like Justine said, we are Administration 4th Recon Division Yaksha. A unit consisting of only Bygone Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like Justine said, we are Administration 4th Recon Division Yaksha. A unit consisting of only Bygone Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like Justine said, we are Administration 4th Recon Division Yaksha. A unit consisting of only Bygone Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might be from different backgrounds, but we're all living here under the management of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might be from different backgrounds, but we're all living here under the management of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might be from different backgrounds, but we're all living here under the management of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because the descendants of Bygones like us shouldn't be exposed to this world yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because the descendants of Bygones like us shouldn't be exposed to this world yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because the descendants of Bygones like us shouldn't be exposed to this world yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't be exposed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't be exposed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't be exposed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, has everyone here been <color=#ffd34c>kidnapped</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, has everyone here been <color=#ffd34c>kidnapped</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, has everyone here been <color=#ffd34c>kidnapped</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, guess you're one to hold grudges.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, guess you're one to hold grudges.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, guess you're one to hold grudges.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk tsk! What a loser that rookie is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk tsk! What a loser that rookie is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk tsk! What a loser that rookie is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does it look like everyone here is being kept here by force?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does it look like everyone here is being kept here by force?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does it look like everyone here is being kept here by force?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It sure doesn't seem like it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It sure doesn't seem like it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It sure doesn't seem like it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Where should I start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Where should I start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Where should I start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, this world is actually very precarious. Like a tightrope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, this world is actually very precarious. Like a tightrope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, this world is actually very precarious. Like a tightrope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the smallest change in variables can alter the fate of the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the smallest change in variables can alter the fate of the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the smallest change in variables can alter the fate of the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, there's a secret organization that manages the causality of the world to prevent it from failing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, there's a secret organization that manages the causality of the world to prevent it from failing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, there's a secret organization that manages the causality of the world to prevent it from failing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This secret organization is called <color=#ffd34c>the Administration</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This secret organization is called <color=#ffd34c>the Administration</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This secret organization is called <color=#ffd34c>the Administration</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And your case is no exception, stray cat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And your case is no exception, stray cat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And your case is no exception, stray cat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there was no Administration cover-up, it wouldn't have ended with a couple of reporters showing up at your door.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there was no Administration cover-up, it wouldn't have ended with a couple of reporters showing up at your door.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there was no Administration cover-up, it wouldn't have ended with a couple of reporters showing up at your door.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We made contact with you to prevent an irreversible situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We made contact with you to prevent an irreversible situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We made contact with you to prevent an irreversible situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what is this irreversible situation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what is this irreversible situation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what is this irreversible situation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, I get the gist of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, I get the gist of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, I get the gist of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the Administration's division system.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the Administration's division system.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the Administration's division system.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Commander that established the Yaksha Division is here as well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get prepared. We're going.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get prepared. We're going.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get prepared. We're going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CSE Level 3?
records.m_Talk_DEU: CSE Level 3?
records.m_Talk_FRA: CSE Level 3?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take me with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take me with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take me with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know anything about what happened that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know anything about what happened that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know anything about what happened that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...

records.m_Talk_ENG: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? Maybe I'll be of some help.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? Maybe I'll be of some help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Don't be ridiculous!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Don't be ridiculous!

Deputy Commander, don't listen to her. Just

records.m_Talk_DEU: But you have to stay right next to me, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know a facility like this was hiding so close by...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, surprised?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, surprised?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, surprised?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place used to be like a frontier base for the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: While we stay in the real world, we usually reside in this frontier base and wait for operations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop joking! I'm a firefighter, you know!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This was my jurisdiction. I even memorized the number of street lamps and the location of all the trash cans!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way that I didn't know about a facility like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's normal that you didn't know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's facilities in the real world usually use a technology called <color=#ffd34c>awareness distortion</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Awareness distortion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Awareness distortion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Awareness distortion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Basically, humans only see what they want to see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We use that psychology, and generate waves that distort their perception around the base.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, the base exists but it appears not to exist to ordinary people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, some conspiracy theory nerds occasionally seem to discover it from time to time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you trying to hide... by going through all this?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I think we're here.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! You don't know? It's a special division of the Administration!

root.m_Talk_FRA: We might be from different backgrounds, but we're all living here under the management of the Administration.

root.m_Talk_FRA: And what is this irreversible situation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, the rookie clearly lacks imagination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are a race that is ruthless toward everyone else but themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...
root.m_Talk_DEU: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...
root.m_Talk_FRA: They even tear each other apart just because of a difference in skin color...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think of what they'll do if they find out about half-human, half-Bygones like us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, how else can you explain it, then?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A person doesn't just grow animal ears and a tail out of the blue. That just doesn't make any sense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah. I did suffer a lot for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It appears that among our compatriots, some have less noticeable external characteristics, or are able to better conceal them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But most of our compatriots stand out too much compared to regular Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This world is... just not ready to accept freaks like us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why the Administration is shielding the descendants of Bygones from the world?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But technically speaking, this is a <color=#ffd34c>contract</color> we have with them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Until the world is able to accept the existence of Bygones, we guarantee the safety of your compatriots.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our Commander made a deal with the Administration under this condition and established the Yaksha Division.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're a special unit under the Administration, but it wasn't established by the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administration can't do anything about being shorthanded.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are divisions independently established and operated as needed by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And there are divisions that each propose solidarity with forces that have reached the truth of the world in their own fields.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration provides intel and technology to them, and they provide manpower in return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, I get the gist of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, I get the gist of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, I get the gist of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So they make a contract because it benefits both parties.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. <color=#ffd34c>Special armed units</color> established to carry out the management of the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the Administration's division system.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the Administration's division system.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the Administration's division system.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Commander that established the Yaksha Division is here as well?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the Commander that established the Yaksha Division is here as well?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the Commander that established the Yaksha Division is here as well?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Level 3 CSE Level Corruption forecast in Zone D-9 has been issued.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is seeking cooperation from divisions stationed in the Normalside. What should we do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get prepared. We're going.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get prepared. We're going.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get prepared. We're going.

root.m_Talk_ENG: CSE Level 3?
root.m_Talk_DEU: CSE Level 3?
root.m_Talk_FRA: CSE Level 3?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it strange that a Corruption disaster of this magnitude is occurring in the Normalside?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We had a major incident recently, and I think it's a reaction to that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A recent major incident...? Are you talking about the fire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the monsters that appeared in the fire might reappear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But it might be a little dangerous this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be right back. Can you wait here for a bit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take me with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take me with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take me with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know anything about what happened that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know anything about what happened that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know anything about what happened that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But as the sole survivor of that fire, I think I deserve to know what's going on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to see this Corruption disaster with my own eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I want to see how the Administration deals with it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! What a cocky rookie she is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's a Counterside Effect in the Normalside...

root.m_Talk_ENG: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: it's not easy for a noob like you to deal with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a firefighter. So I won't drag you down at least.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? Maybe I'll be of some help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? Maybe I'll be of some help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? Maybe I'll be of some help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Don't be ridiculous!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Don't be ridiculous!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Don't be ridiculous!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Deputy Commander, don't listen to her. Just
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Deputy Commander, don't listen to her. Just
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Deputy Commander, don't listen to her. Just
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. Follow me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. Follow me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. Follow me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you have to stay right next to me, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you have to stay right next to me, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you have to stay right next to me, okay?
